---
title: "Resources to all the Data Used"
---

#Links to my Data

[Taylor Swift CSV](https://github.com/CelineeUWC/SDS264_spring26/blob/main/TaylorSwift.csv)

[BillieEilish CSV](https://github.com/CelineeUWC/SDS264_spring26/blob/main/BillieEilish.csv)

[States]("https://rdrr.io/cran/poliscidata/man/states.html")
